testcase.name: completeOrder
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [2] but found [4] at tests.EndToEndTest.completeOrder(EndToEndTest.java:43) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 37 stack frames

testcase.name: completeOrder

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: input[onclick='Billing.save()']' (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
